_meta.note: MOCKUP fixture for the Ansley Mall demo. Numbers are illustrative, sourced where possible. Provenance tags: google=Google Solar API study, measured=Google Earth trace, research=our default constants (FINAL.md/doc 02), gap=not yet pulled. Ranges shown where a value is sensitive (cost/rate).

name: Ansley Mall
structure: steel bar-joist + metal deck (1964) — low load headroom

energyStarScore.note: pull from CBEEO before quoting a 'before' score

surfaces.usableNote: Google obstruction-aware design used the bulk of the roof (red zones in reference imagery)

addedLoadCapacityPsf.note: needs original structural drawings; gates green roof, not PV

areaM2.note: ESTIMATE (~6 ac) — measure in Google Earth to firm up canopy + tree counts

surfaces.note: west edge adjoins the Atlanta BeltLine corridor

lotCanopySolar.label: Parking-lot solar carport canopies (OUR value-add — Google modeled 0 W on the lot)

greenRoof.label: Extensive green roof (partial — structurally gated)
greenRoof.note: competes with rooftop PV for the same roof — split or biosolar a portion

coolRoof.label: Cool roof
coolRoof.note: baseline re-roof obligation that green/solar area EXEMPTS — the killer hook

pctOfBuildingLoadOffset.basis: 4.34 GWh generated / 13.43 GWh used; all self-consumed (no export haircut)

paybackYearsRange.note: highly sensitive to $/W and $/kWh — present as a band, not a point

codes.note: re-roof triggers cool roof; green/solar area exempt
parking 30+ spaces -> 1 tree/8 spaces (~80 lot trees)
green-roof load gate; PV clears (~3-5 psf)
export ~6-7c < retail; load >> generation so all solar self-consumed

cityContribution.framingForMayorsOffice: Side-B: contribution to City of Atlanta climate goals
cityContribution.co2TowardTarget: ~1,665 t CO2/yr toward the 59%-by-2030 / net-zero-2050 goal
cityContribution.cleanEnergy: ~4.34 GWh/yr on-site solar toward 100% clean energy by 2035
cityContribution.stormwater: ~2.4M gal/yr retained toward the citywide GI target
cityContribution.plan: aligns with Climate Resilient ATL (first Climate Resilience Action Plan, 2026)
